name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mark Kelly is up by 2 over McSally in AZ!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Former astronaut and Navy fighter pilot Mark Kelly is up 47 to 45 against GOP incumbent Senator Martha McSally in the highly watched Arizona Senate race. This seat is _critical_ for Democrats to flip to retake the Senate, and Mark Kelly stands a good chance of doing just that. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have released their latest Senate race ratings, and they've all placed Martha McSally's Arizona seat firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. McSally is already drawing pro-Trump GOP primary challengers, putting extra pressure on her to go even further to the right. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws _**multiple times!**_ We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc5/6e9863e8/155f1b8d/1db0e62a/2762788058/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/4PSH0Sz8") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc5/6e9863e8/155f1b8d/1db0e62a/2762788058/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/4PSH0Sz8") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc5/6e9863e8/155f1b8d/1db0e629/2762788058/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=WDTO20191004c.ND&refcode2=hcuZbXBb9mVIrR1jxAe1")

| Hey team -- I'm going through Cory's debate prep materials and need your input. The fourth DNC debate in Ohio will feature _twelve candidates_ \-- some of whom will appear on stage for the very first time. Cory will be up there with Andrew Yang, Amy Klobuchar, Beto O'Rourke, Tulsi Gabbard, Tom Steyer, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Elizabeth Warren, Joe Biden, Julian Castro, and Bernie Sanders. **[The stage will be more crowded with 12 candidates so Cory is already starting to prepare -- but our team wants your advice before we finish drafting his prep documents. What issues do you want to hear about most at the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191004_AD_20191004-su-AD-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory's made it clear from the beginning: this is a grassroots campaign where everyone deserves to have their voice heard. These moments are a major opportunity for an underdog campaign like ours, and this grassroots team always makes the most of it. We're eager to read through your ideas and share them with the boss. Thank you,
Addisu Addisu Demissie

body:

Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? | Hey there, Jenn here! I oversee our campaign's organizing team, and I'm writing to tell you about what a difference the $6 million we raised over the past three months will make for our operations in the early states. **[We're making critical investments in the early states -- and beyond -- this quarter, but our fundraising needs to keep up if we want our campaign to continue to grow. Will you chip in to help our team expand?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191005_BHQ_20191005-fr-BHQ-investments-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In a race where a recent poll found that _only nine percent_ of Democrats say their minds are definitely made up about whom they're supporting for the nomination, building our organization in these states has never been more important. That's why our campaign announced that, from now until the end of the year, we will be opening new field offices and hiring additional staff in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina. This means more folks out on the ground, talking to their neighbors about our campaign and sharing Cory's message with undecided voters. These investments in the early states will pay off when Democrats head to caucus and vote in February -- but we need to start now in order to have the greatest impact. **[Will you chip in to help sustain our growing campaign? name: Andrew Yang
subject: We Have Leveled Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
What a week. Thanks to you, we announced a record quarter with $10 million in contributions to the campaign, almost 4 times what we raised last quarter!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1328%2E377263%2EBUlTO_) Hello and thank you for your support!

What a week. Thanks to you, we announced a record quarter with $10 million in contributions to the campaign, almost 4 times what we raised last quarter. This was a political earthquake with Politico, CNN, Fox, the Washington Post and others stating that I am now a serious contender for the nomination. In the words of one commentator, we now have the capacity to ‘do something' historic.

We are investing smart; we are hiring staff and organizers in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, South Carolina, and other key states. We had an enormous rally in Los Angeles on Monday that drew over 5,000 people. I just visited our office in Las Vegas, and the Yang Gang there is amazing. We had a Town Hall in Las Vegas that drew hundreds. [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/69?t=2&akid=1328%2E377263%2EBUlTO_) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/69?t=3&akid=1328%2E377263%2EBUlTO_) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/69?t=4&akid=1328%2E377263%2EBUlTO_) A union organizer told me, “All of the candidates have come through to this very hall and this is the biggest crowd we’ve seen.”

The conventional political playbook is to throw our newfound cash at TV advertising in the early states. That seems like a great way to spend a lot of money quickly. I’ve been around the block enough to know that when everyone does something a certain way, there’s often good reason -- but that there are also sometimes different approaches that can yield better results or accomplish a goal more cost-effectively.

We certainly didn’t get here by following the conventional playbook.

We are going to lean into the qualities that have gotten us to this point. Embracing our humanity. Using reason and speaking the truth. Bringing people together instead of tearing them down. Letting everyone know that we are capable of both better solutions and a more forward-looking approach to our politics.

We have already broken unprecedented ground – and the best is yet to come. We have earned our chance to make history together. If we pour our hearts out in the next several months and keep growing the tribe, we will continue to stun the world.

I can see the path ahead. Let’s do it.

Fired up for the 4th quarter,
-Andrew | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12739?t=20&akid=1328%2E377263%2EBUlTO_)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP knows it can only win by silencing voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, After the Supreme Court ruled that a key part of the Voting Rights Act was unconstitutional in 2013, the floodgates opened for states to pass restrictions on voting rights that disenfranchise minority voters and help keep the GOP in power. In the six years since that fateful decision, GOP legislatures and election offices closed 1,688 poll sites in 13 states, with many closed sites clustered in the South. In Texas alone, they shut down 750 polling places. In some Texas counties, that's left upwards of 75% of polling stations closed \-- which is especially disastrous in rural countries where voters must take off work, drive long distances, and wait in long lines just to exercise their Constitutional right to vote. Expanding voting rights should be a goal no matter what party you belong to \-- yet Republican-controlled state legislatures are overseeing this massive dismantling of voting rights across the country. They are gerrymandering their states' election maps, creating poll taxes, and blocking automatic voter registration, all in an attempt to pick and choose the electorate. Republicans know that their ideas aren't winning over any voters, so they now resort to silencing anyone who won't vote for them instead \-- and Democrats need to stand up to their blatant voter suppression. We need to rally and push back against the GOP's onslaught of attacks on democracy, and the only way we'll do this is vote them out and win these legislatures back. [**WDTO is ready to fight against the GOP for control of state legislatures, but we know they 're going to throw millions of dollars in dark money into every election they can, so we need your help. Please, every donation made, no matter how small, will go toward making true, lasting change in our elections. Could you support us with a donation of just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc9/6e9863e8/155890e9/1db0e67d/1274140297/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20191005a.ND-b&refcode2=IEmQ8aYvMlbGimVWxPMq") Thank you for standing with us! -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc9/6e9863e8/155890e9/1db0e643/1274140297/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20191005a.ND-b&refcode2=IEmQ8aYvMlbGimVWxPMq")

body:
America’s unemployment rate fell to a 50-year low last month, dropping to 3.5 percent and matching a level last seen in December 1969. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=779d0ae8ac&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**US Unemployment Rate Falls to Five-Decade Low of 3.5%**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=515bd3288a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
America’s unemployment rate fell to a 50-year low last month, dropping to 3.5 percent and matching a level last seen in December 1969, Alexandra Steigrad reports. “The jobless rate for Hispanics also hit a new record low, while the level for African Americans maintained its lowest level ever.”

**More** : [6.4 million jobs since Election Day—more than the population of Maryland!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=93fde3df38&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump's Transparency is Driving the Left Nuts (and Messing Up Their Impeachment Dreams)**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0422a4ed26&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“He wasn't supposed to release the transcripts. Or the whistleblower report. He was expected to do what any president would have done – what President Obama always did. Hide the evidence,” former Rep. Jason Chaffetz (R-UT) writes. House Democrats “weren't counting on the president's unprecedented transparency. Nobody releases a transcript of calls between heads of state. But Donald Trump did.”

🎬**President Trump:**[“They’re trying to stop me because I’m fighting for you.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e40cd2f74&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Schiff’s Shifty Timeline**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af0208472f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“If the latest impeachment push continues to backfire, Democrats can thank their duplicitous House Intelligence chairman, Adam Schiff,” Kimberly Strassel writes. This week, a bombshell report revealed that Schiff’s team had advance knowledge of the complaint from the “whistleblower”—and withheld that fact from the American public.

**4 Pinocchios: [“We have not spoken directly with the whistleblower.” – Adam Schiff](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e0ceb8c17&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2019/10/04/schiffs-false-claim-his-committee-had-not-spoken-whistleblower/")**
---
|
---
| [**First Lady Begins Wyoming Visit with Tour of Jackson**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5007e3582e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Casper Star-Tribune_
“First lady Melania Trump kicked off a two-day visit to Wyoming on Thursday, meeting with local fourth graders and touring a sliver of Wyoming backcountry as part of promotional efforts for her ‘Be Best’ initiative,” Nick Reynolds writes. “In Jackson Hole Mercantile, which faces the town square, many customers were caught by surprise, according to a shopkeeper, with some saying that the first lady’s visit ‘made their day.’”

** ****Watch:** [First Lady explores Wyoming’s Snake River with 4th graders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a64271374c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Says Dems Out to 'Raid Medicare' to Fund Socialism; He Signs Executive Order Seeking Changes**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3d4dc8a7d&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
President Trump signed an executive order on Thursday to protect the current Medicare system—a stark contrast to Congressional Democrats’ “Medicare-for-All” scheme, Andrew O’Reilly reports. “Signing the order at the Villages – a retirement community north of Orlando – Trump singled out Democrats he said want to ‘totally obliterate Medicare.’”

[Seniors will never lose their Medicare on President Trump’s watch.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd393dd06d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump Joins Google CEO in Dallas for Tech Giant's $3.5M Pledge to White House Jobs Initiative**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4fc95e1ab&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Dallas Morning Star_
“With first daughter and White House adviser Ivanka Trump by his side, Google CEO Sundar Pichai signed a pledge Thursday in Dallas that the company will boost its investment in tech skills training for American workers,” Melissa Repko reports. Google is one of more than 350 companies to join the White House’s Pledge to America's Workers.
---

**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : October 3, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,
It doesn’t have to be this way. America doesn’t have to have a president that asks foreign countries to interfere in our elections on their behalf. America doesn’t have to have a president who locks children up in cages with little food, water, or medical care.
America doesn’t have to have a president solely focused on enriching and protecting him or herself from legal action.
That’s why I’m emailing you today to make this promise to you —**a Weld Administration will run our country just like I ran the Commonwealth of Massachusetts.**
My administration will use the same conservative principles that guided me as Governor to **cut taxes 21 times** ,**balance a state budget** that historically had been grotesquely mismanaged, and pass **massive reforms to our education and welfare systems.**
And most importantly,**my administration will be guided by the rule of law and what is in the best interest of the American people.** Because at the end of the day, that’s who I’ll be elected to serve.
But to fulfill this promise, I’m going to need your help.
We are 130 days away from the New Hampshire primary, and even closer to the Iowa caucuses. If we want to give the American people a real choice in this election, we need to make sure we’re making critical investments in those states **right now.**
[**Can you help us make those critical investments today by pitching in $20.20 to our campaign?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U20SaW0OcBsSAPFrpDMdCCry&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191005_fr_s&n=4)
[DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGHgzc1oXjtBgsnplA5qd7Mo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191005_fr_s&n=5)
---
Thank you for your support,
Bill

name: Margaret Good
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
I know you've been reading a lot of emails from my team and me these past few days -- so first, I want to say thank you for your patience and your commitment to this campaign in the days leading up to the end of the quarter as we worked to meet our fundraising goal.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ea8D4Ew3oTqjrfHgxsfozjq9Y_eZXHUwAHCIEgrM3NA=/Oa0hpJbXz2QOmROUA5t0YBTdQFl5AR5dI_-hE1vhGfM=?refcode=em_ty_2019.10.05_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
Team,

I know you've been reading a lot of emails from my team and me these past few days -- so first, I want to say thank you for your patience and your commitment to this campaign in the days leading up to the end of the quarter as we worked to meet our fundraising goal.

**Now, I have good news, friends -- THANKS TO YOU, we made our goal!**

I'm so grateful for the support our campaign received from people all across our district, state, and country. It reflects what we're experiencing on the ground: Southwest Florida is ready for new representation, and people are willing to fight for the change we deserve.

We will use your contributions wisely -- they will help us register more voters, hire key staff, open an office, and communicate with voters. Thank you, thank you, thank you!

Together, we've begun to build the grassroots strength of our operation. Now, we have to keep growing our supporters, keep spreading the word, keep reaching out to voters.

So, I have one more favor to ask -- the next time you read one of our emails that you particularly like, please forward it to a friend or two and suggest they get involved. I would love it if you were part of helping grow our movement!

Thank you!!!!

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Nothing about committing crimes in public makes them any less criminal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I started talking about how we need to impeach Donald Trump in 2017. Back
then, not a lot of folks knew where to stand on the issue and weren’t sure
if it was the best path to go down if we want to unite our country.

But everything we’ve learned these past weeks since we found out about
Trump’s phone call with Ukraine has confirmed an undeniable truth: Trump
will do anything to interfere with our elections again if it buys him a
victory.

For years, our president has believed he’s above the law and it’s time to
prove him wrong. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191005-impeach/?source=ema20191005-59484&t=1001&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ ]We want to show Trump how many Americans now are
standing up to say this corruption has no place in the White House. Add
your name to our petition if you’re with us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191005-impeach/?source=ema20191005-59484&t=1002&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ ]Sign the petition

The question of impeachment has only become more urgent every day that
passes in this lawless administration.

Just the other month, Mueller testified to Congress and confirmed that
Trump is not innocent when it comes to Russian interference in the 2016
election.

This week, Trump was on live television when he asked China and Ukraine to
open an investigation into one of his political opponents.

And on Thursday night, House investigators released numerous text messages
that clearly show how senior State Department officials were involved in
leveraging a deal between the Ukrainian president’s top aide and President
Trump’s personal lawyer, that would promise a summit between their
country’s leaders in exchange for information about Biden’s son.

Since day one of his administration, Trump has made it clear that there is
nothing too immoral, too despicable, or too corrupt that he won’t do to
advance his own political agenda and personal interests. His shamelessness
has hit rock bottom. We need to let him know that nothing about committing
crimes in public makes them any less criminal.

I believe our country is rising up right now to issue that call – more
Americans than ever recognize that this will be a defining moment in our
nation’s history. I’m inspired to see more Democrats who were previously
on the fence about going forward with impeachment, stepping up to say
enough is enough – no one is above the law. And I’m proud to hear that a
record number of Americans now support going forward with impeachment.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191005-impeach/?source=ema20191005-59484&t=1003&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ ]Let’s send Trump a message that Americans aren’t standing on the
sidelines when it comes to his impeachment and saving our democracy.
Please sign our petition today so we can show Trump the numbers are
against him.

Sincerely,

Beto O’Rourke

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191005-impeach/?source=ema20191005-59484&t=1004&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ ]Sign the petition

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191005footer&t=1005&refcode2=59484_444211_8bxGaJ&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=59484%2E444211%2E8bxGaJ

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

One ad and one conversation at a time, we've got a plan to make sure Elizabeth is the next president of the United States. It takes help from grassroots donors. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852847a/45c30650/109b99268/668ee31e/253324956/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

This campaign is built by grassroots organizing.

Across the country, volunteers are working their hearts out -- knocking on doors, making phone calls for a few hours a week after work, sending text messages that bring more people into the fight, and inviting friends and neighbors over to talk about how they can get involved.

And as we get closer to the caucuses and primaries, we're also amplifying this movement's voice through digital and TV media. It's another way we're reaching out to potential voters -- and it's another piece of what we need to do to win.

**We're launching an eight-figure advertising campaign in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina. If you've been to one of our campaign events, chances are you might be part of them.**

**[Buying ads now is how we make sure we get Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change in front of voters and caucus-goers. Will you chip in for the first time today to help power all the investments we need to make in this important next step for our movement?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852847a/45c30650/109b99268/668ee301/253324956/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzExRl9FR1JfU1RSX1BfMjAxOTEwMDVfVjFTMyJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK11F_EGR_STR_P_20191005_V1S3")**

| | Hi Peter, According to a recent _Washington Post_ survey, almost 60 percent of American teens are scared of climate change and its effects on the planet. They rank it as one of the most important issues facing the country, along with gun policy and healthcare. However, over half of them also said that they are motivated to do something about it, and a quarter of them have already taken concrete actions. subject: Fwd: You. Me. Dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Did you see my note below? I'd like to take you to dinner -- my treat! **[All you have to do is chip in $1, $5, or whatever you can and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to join me and others for a team dinner.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We'll take care of your flight and hotel accommodations. All you have to do is bring yourself and be ready for an evening of great food and fun conversation. **Here 's a link to enter the contest: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As I said in my first email, there may even be some dad jokes. (You've been warned!) Really looking forward to this,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_button1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ If you've ever wanted to grab dinner with your favorite vegan presidential candidate -- friend, do I have some good news for you. I'll be honest, my schedule is a little busy these days. On most weeks, I'm visiting more towns than I can count on both hands. But, what really keeps me going are the wonderful people I have the pleasure of meeting on the campaign trail every single day. During these past few months, I've met with folks in living rooms in Iowa, union halls in Nevada, high school gymnasiums in South Carolina, and at diners in New Hampshire -- and everywhere in between. **Now I want to meet you.** **[So friend, I want to take you to dinner. Chip in today and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to join me and others for a team dinner. We'll fly you out for a bite, good conversation, and, probably, a few dad jokes.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Not vegan? Not a problem! We can go to a restaurant that has non-vegan options too -- I promise! There's so much we can talk about. The latest Marvel movies, Star Trek, criminal justice reform, what it's like to be vegan, how wonderful Rosario Dawson is -- you name it! Fun conversation, great company, all over a good meal. **[I hope we'll have the chance to grab dinner together. All you have to do to be automatically entered is chip in right now to help us grow our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** And hey, dinner's on me. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191005_CB_20191005-fr-CB-dinnercontestbump-actives_actives_button2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 3, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a7a/5fca0d19/77e4d885/291f4751/198893539/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab") or click [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a7a/5fca0d19/77e4d885/291f4750/198893539/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Dinner-with-Cory") to enter without contributing. Four (4) winners will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to a destination in Sponsor's sole discretion; one-night hotel accommodations for winner; opportunity to have dinner with Senator Cory Booker (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a7a/5fca0d19/77e4d885/291f475f/198893539/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
